text:
>>>>> "olli" == olli hauer <ohauer@gmx.de> writes:

olli> I hope you do not have spamd in production with parameter -b since it
olli> changed with spamd-4.1.x *from greylisting to blacklisting* nearly 3
olli> years ago.

Actually, the problem was triggered even with obspamd_flags=-v.

(Not sure why... I don't grok shell as well since I've done everything
in Perl for 20 years.)

In any case, the code is wrong. :)
